name: Kouzuki Momonosuke (Jolly Roger Foil)
effect_text: [Activate:Main] (1) (You may rest the specified number of DON!! cards in your cost area) You may rest this Character: Look at 5 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 "Land of Wano" type card and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.This card has been officially errata'd.
